description.zh: Anthropic claude-code CLI 适配 · spawn `claude --mode stream` 子进程,把 ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus。实际 runner 在 server/src/cli-providers/claude-code/,本 plugin 声明 metadata + Bus 入口。
description.en: Anthropic claude-code CLI adapter. Spawns `claude --mode stream` and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the Bus. Real runner lives in server/src/cli-providers/claude-code/; this plugin declares metadata + Bus entry.
